name: Evix ERP Integrations
desc: Led full architectural design and API integration of Evix ERP for 500+ subscribed enterprise clients via RESTful APIs — ensuring high availability, seamless data synchronization, and strict tenant isolation.

name: SaaS Logistics Platform
desc: Owned end-to-end architecture and delivery of a multi-tenant SaaS logistics platform, scaling to 7,000+ active delivery agents with real-time tracking via WebSockets — designed for zero-downtime under high-traffic peak load.

name: HR Management System
desc: Architected and built a comprehensive HR Management System covering automated payroll processing, attendance tracking, leave management, and configurable policy management.

name: Restaurant Management System
desc: Developed and enhanced Restaurant Management Systems and Hotel Reservation Systems — improving operational workflows through full-stack Laravel + React solutions.

name: E-commerce Platforms
desc: Developed multi-vertical e-commerce platforms with secure payment gateway integration and inventory management across multiple industries.

name: School Management System
desc: Developed cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter: School Management System, E-commerce Platform, and Hotel Booking System.
